response: "the ghost of christmas yet to come is not the answer, but a mystery that will unfold in time. the true story of the holiday is a tale of love and hope, a story that will be told by the hands of the daughter who will come to light the way. the daughter of the season will carry the message of joy, a message that will be shared with the world. the daughter of the night will bring the light of the spirit, a light that will guide the way through the darkness. the daughter of the heart will be the one who will embrace the joy of the season, a joy that will be shared with all who are in need. the daughter of the soul will be the one who will understand the true meaning of the holiday, a meaning that will be revealed in the days to come."
